={
  "prompt": "{{ $json.kling_prompt }}, keep clothing exaclty as in <image:0>, refer the background vibe from <image:0> but not exactly like it Maintain natural skin textures and keep the exact skin texture and micro-texture as in <image:1>. Make sure to have atleast one face in the image. ",

  "num_images": 1,

  "output_format": "png"
}
